verses.latin_vulgate: Audi, Israël : tu transgredieris hodie Jordanem, ut possideas nationes maximas et fortiores te, civitates ingentes, et ad cælum usque muratas,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁמַ֣ע יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל אַתָּ֨ה עֹבֵ֤ר הַיּוֹם֙ אֶת־הַיַּרְדֵּ֔ן לָבֹא֙ לָרֶ֣שֶׁת גּוֹיִ֔ם גְּדֹלִ֥ים וַעֲצֻמִ֖ים מִמֶּ֑ךָּ עָרִ֛ים גְּדֹלֹ֥ת וּבְצֻרֹ֖ת בַּשָּׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hear, O Israel: Thou shalt go over the Jordan this day; to possess nations very great, and stronger than thyself, cities great, and walled up to the sky,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuule Israel: tänäpänä sinä menet Jordanin yli, ettäs tulet omistamaan sitä kansaa, joka on sinua suurempi ja väkevämpi, suuria kaupungeita rakennetuita taivaaseen asti,
verses.king_james: Hear, O Israel: Thou art to pass over Jordan this day, to go in to possess nations greater and mightier than thyself, cities great and fenced up to heaven,

verses.latin_vulgate: populum magnum atque sublimem, filios Enacim, quos ipse vidisti et audisti, quibus nullus potest ex adverso resistere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַֽם־גָּד֥וֹל וָרָ֖ם בְּנֵ֣י עֲנָקִ֑ים אֲשֶׁ֨ר אַתָּ֤ה יָדַ֙עְתָּ֙ וְאַתָּ֣ה שָׁמַ֔עְתָּ מִ֣י יִתְיַצֵּ֔ב לִפְנֵ֖י בְּנֵ֥י עֲנָֽק׃
verses.douay_rheims: A people great and tall, the sons of the Enacims, whom thou hast seen, and heard of, against whom no man is able to stand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Suurta ja pitkää kansaa, Enakin poikia, jotka sinä tunnet, joista sinä myös kuullut olet sanottavan: kuka voi seisoa Enakin poikia vastaan?
verses.king_james: A people great and tall, the children of the Anakims, whom thou knowest, and of whom thou hast heard say, Who can stand before the children of Anak!

verses.latin_vulgate: Scies ergo hodie quod Dominus Deus tuus ipse transibit ante te, ignis devorans atque consumens, qui conterat eos, et deleat atque disperdat ante faciem tuam velociter, sicut locutus est tibi :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָדַעְתָּ֣ הַיּ֗וֹם כִּי֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהֶ֜יךָ הֽוּא־הָעֹבֵ֤ר לְפָנֶ֙יךָ֙ אֵ֣שׁ אֹֽכְלָ֔ה ה֧וּא יַשְׁמִידֵ֛ם וְה֥וּא יַכְנִיעֵ֖ם לְפָנֶ֑יךָ וְהֽוֹרַשְׁתָּ֤ם וְהַֽאֲבַדְתָּם֙ מַהֵ֔ר כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר דִּבֶּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה לָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou shalt know therefore this day that the Lord thy God himself will pass over before thee, a devouring and consuming fire, to destroy and extirpate and bring them to nothing before thy face quickly, as he hath spoken to thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sinun pitää tänäpänä tietämän, että Herra sinun Jumalas käy sinun edelläs niinkuin kuluttavainen tuli; hän hukuttaa heitä, ja hän alentaa heitä sinun edessäs, ettäs ajat heitä ulos ja hukutat nopiasti, niinkuin Herra sanoi sinulle.
verses.king_james: Understand therefore this day, that the Lord thy God is he which goeth over before thee; as a consuming fire he shall destroy them, and he shall bring them down before thy face: so shalt thou drive them out, and destroy them quickly, as the Lord hath said unto thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: ne dicas in corde tuo, cum deleverit eos Dominus Deus tuus in conspectu tuo : Propter justitiam meam introduxit me Dominus ut terram hanc possiderem, cum propter impietates suas istæ deletæ sint nationes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תֹּאמַ֣ר בִּלְבָבְךָ֗ בַּהֲדֹ֣ף יְהֹוָה֩ אֱלֹהֶ֨יךָ אֹתָ֥ם ׀ מִלְּפָנֶ֘יךָ֮ לֵאמֹר֒ בְּצִדְקָתִי֙ הֱבִיאַ֣נִי יְהֹוָ֔ה לָרֶ֖שֶׁת אֶת־הָאָ֣רֶץ הַזֹּ֑את וּבְרִשְׁעַת֙ הַגּוֹיִ֣ם הָאֵ֔לֶּה יְהֹוָ֖ה מוֹרִישָׁ֥ם מִפָּנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Say not in thy heart, when the Lord thy God shall have destroyed them in thy sight: For my justice hath the Lord brought me in to possess this land, whereas these nations are destroyed for their wickedness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Herra sinun Jumalas on heidät ajanut sinun edestäs ulos, niin älä sano sydämessäs: Herra on minun tähän tuonut omistamaan tätä maata minun vanhurskauteni tähden; sillä Herra ajaa nämät pakanat sinun edestäs ulos heidän jumalattomuutensa tähden.
verses.king_james: Speak not thou in thine heart, after that the Lord thy God hath cast them out from before thee, saying, For my righteousness the Lord hath brought me in to possess this land: but for the wickedness of these nations the Lord doth drive them out from before thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Neque enim propter justitias tuas, et æquitatem cordis tui ingredieris, ut possideas terras earum : sed quia illæ egerunt impie, introëunte te deletæ sunt : et ut compleret verbum suum Dominus, quod sub juramento pollicitus est patribus tuis, Abraham, Isaac, et Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֣א בְצִדְקָתְךָ֗ וּבְיֹ֙שֶׁר֙ לְבָ֣בְךָ֔ אַתָּ֥ה בָ֖א לָרֶ֣שֶׁת אֶת־אַרְצָ֑ם כִּ֞י בְּרִשְׁעַ֣ת ׀ הַגּוֹיִ֣ם הָאֵ֗לֶּה יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהֶ֙יךָ֙ מוֹרִישָׁ֣ם מִפָּנֶ֔יךָ וּלְמַ֜עַן הָקִ֣ים אֶת־הַדָּבָ֗ר אֲשֶׁ֨ר נִשְׁבַּ֤ע יְהֹוָה֙ לַאֲבֹתֶ֔יךָ לְאַבְרָהָ֥ם לְיִצְחָ֖ק וּֽלְיַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: For it is not for thy justices, and the uprightness of thy heart that thou shalt go in to possess their lands: but because they have done wickedly, they are destroyed at thy coming in: and that the Lord might accomplish his word, which he promised by oath to thy fathers Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.
verses.finnish_biblia: Et sinä tule omistamaan heidän maatansa vanhurskautes eli sydämes vakuuden tähden; vaan Herra sinun Jumalas ajaa pakanat ulos heidän jumalattomuutensa tähden, että Herra vahvistais sanansa, jonka Herra sinun isilles Abrahamille, Isaakille ja Jakobille vannoi.
verses.king_james: Not for thy righteousness, or for the uprightness of thine heart, dost thou go to possess their land: but for the wickedness of these nations the Lord thy God doth drive them out from before thee, and that he may perform the word which the Lord sware unto thy fathers, Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.

verses.latin_vulgate: Scito ergo quod non propter justitias tuas Dominus Deus tuus dederit tibi terram hanc optimam in possessionem, cum durissimæ cervicis sis populus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָדַעְתָּ֗ כִּ֠י לֹ֤א בְצִדְקָֽתְךָ֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱ֠לֹהֶ֠יךָ נֹתֵ֨ן לְךָ֜ אֶת־הָאָ֧רֶץ הַטּוֹבָ֛ה הַזֹּ֖את לְרִשְׁתָּ֑הּ כִּ֥י עַם־קְשֵׁה־עֹ֖רֶף אָֽתָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Know therefore that the Lord thy God giveth thee not this excellent land in possession for thy justices, for thou art a very stiffnecked people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tiedä nyt, ettei Herra sinun Jumalas anna sinulle tätä hyvää maata, omistaakses sitä sinun vanhurskautes tähden; sillä sinä olet niskurikansa.
verses.king_james: Understand therefore, that the Lord thy God giveth thee not this good land to possess it for thy righteousness; for thou art a stiffnecked people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memento, et ne obliviscaris, quomodo ad iracundiam provocaveris Dominum Deum tuum in solitudine. Ex eo die, quo egressus es ex Ægypto usque ad locum istum, semper adversum Dominum contendisti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זְכֹר֙ אַל־תִּשְׁכַּ֔ח אֵ֧ת אֲשֶׁר־הִקְצַ֛פְתָּ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ בַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר לְמִן־הַיּ֞וֹם אֲשֶׁר־יָצָ֣אתָ ׀ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֗יִם עַד־בֹּֽאֲכֶם֙ עַד־הַמָּק֣וֹם הַזֶּ֔ה מַמְרִ֥ים הֱיִיתֶ֖ם עִם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Remember, and forget not how thou provokedst the Lord thy God to wrath in the wilderness. From the day that thou camest out of Egypt unto this place, thou hast always strove against the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Muista ja älä unhota, kuinka sinä Herran sinun Jumalas vihoitit korvessa: siitä päivästä kuin sinä läksit Egyptin maalta, siihenasti kuin te tulleet olette tähän paikkaan, olette te olleet Herralle vastahakoiset.
verses.king_james: Remember, and forget not, how thou provokedst the Lord thy God to wrath in the wilderness: from the day that thou didst depart out of the land of Egypt, until ye came unto this place, ye have been rebellious against the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nam et in Horeb provocasti eum, et iratus delere te voluit,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְחֹרֵ֥ב הִקְצַפְתֶּ֖ם אֶת־יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיִּתְאַנַּ֧ף יְהֹוָ֛ה בָּכֶ֖ם לְהַשְׁמִ֥יד אֶתְכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For in Horeb, also thou didst provoke him, and he was angry, and would have destroyed thee,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Horebissa te vihoititte Herran, ja Herra vihastui teille, niin että hän tahtoi teidät hukuttaa.
verses.king_james: Also in Horeb ye provoked the Lord to wrath, so that the Lord was angry with you to have destroyed you.

verses.latin_vulgate: quando ascendi in montem, ut acciperem tabulas lapideas, tabulas pacti quod pepigit vobiscum Dominus : et perseveravi in monte quadraginta diebus ac noctibus, panem non comedens, et aquam non bibens.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּעֲלֹתִ֣י הָהָ֗רָה לָקַ֜חַת לוּחֹ֤ת הָֽאֲבָנִים֙ לוּחֹ֣ת הַבְּרִ֔ית אֲשֶׁר־כָּרַ֥ת יְהֹוָ֖ה עִמָּכֶ֑ם וָאֵשֵׁ֣ב בָּהָ֗ר אַרְבָּעִ֥ים יוֹם֙ וְאַרְבָּעִ֣ים לַ֔יְלָה לֶ֚חֶם לֹ֣א אָכַ֔לְתִּי וּמַ֖יִם לֹ֥א שָׁתִֽיתִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: When I went up into the mount to receive the tables of stone, the tables of the covenant which the Lord made with you: and I continued in the mount forty days and nights, neither eating bread, nor drinking water.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin minä vuorelle astuin ottamaan kivisiä tauluja vastaan, liiton tauluja, jonka Herra teki teidän kanssanne, ja minä olin vuorella neljäkymmentä päivää ja neljäkymmentä yötä, ja en syönyt leipää, enkä juonut vettä,
verses.king_james: When I was gone up into the mount to receive the tables of stone, even the tables of the covenant which the Lord made with you, then I abode in the mount forty days and forty nights, I neither did eat bread nor drink water:

verses.latin_vulgate: Deditque mihi Dominus duas tabulas lapideas scriptas digito Dei, et continentes omnia verba quæ vobis locutus est in monte de medio ignis, quando concio populi congregata est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֨ן יְהֹוָ֜ה אֵלַ֗י אֶת־שְׁנֵי֙ לוּחֹ֣ת הָֽאֲבָנִ֔ים כְּתֻבִ֖ים בְּאֶצְבַּ֣ע אֱלֹהִ֑ים וַעֲלֵיהֶ֗ם כְּֽכׇל־הַדְּבָרִ֡ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר דִּבֶּר֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה עִמָּכֶ֥ם בָּהָ֛ר מִתּ֥וֹךְ הָאֵ֖שׁ בְּי֥וֹם הַקָּהָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord gave me two tables of stone written with the finger of God, and containing all the words that he spoke to you in the mount from the midst of the fire, when the people were assembled together.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra antoi minulle kaksi kivistä taulua, kirjoitettu Jumalan sormella, ja niissä olivat kaikki sanat, jotka Herra teille tulesta vuorella puhui, kokouksen päivänä,
verses.king_james: And the Lord delivered unto me two tables of stone written with the finger of God; and on them was written according to all the words, which the Lord spake with you in the mount out of the midst of the fire in the day of the assembly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque transissent quadraginta dies, et totidem noctes, dedit mihi Dominus duas tabulas lapideas, tabulas fœderis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י מִקֵּץ֙ אַרְבָּעִ֣ים י֔וֹם וְאַרְבָּעִ֖ים לָ֑יְלָה נָתַ֨ן יְהֹוָ֜ה אֵלַ֗י אֶת־שְׁנֵ֛י לֻחֹ֥ת הָאֲבָנִ֖ים לֻח֥וֹת הַבְּרִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when forty days were passed, and as many nights, the Lord gave me the two tables of stone, the tables of the covenant,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui neljänkymmenen päivän ja neljänkymmenen yön perästä, että Herra antoi minulle kaksi kivistä liiton taulua,
verses.king_james: And it came to pass at the end of forty days and forty nights, that the Lord gave me the two tables of stone, even the tables of the covenant.

verses.latin_vulgate: dixitque mihi : Surge, et descende hinc cito : quia populus tuus, quem eduxisti de Ægypto, deseruerunt velociter viam, quam demonstrasti eis, feceruntque sibi conflatile.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֵלַ֗י ק֣וּם רֵ֤ד מַהֵר֙ מִזֶּ֔ה כִּ֚י שִׁחֵ֣ת עַמְּךָ֔ אֲשֶׁ֥ר הוֹצֵ֖אתָ מִמִּצְרָ֑יִם סָ֣רוּ מַהֵ֗ר מִן־הַדֶּ֙רֶךְ֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר צִוִּיתִ֔ם עָשׂ֥וּ לָהֶ֖ם מַסֵּכָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And said to me: Arise, and go down from hence quickly: for thy people, which thou hast brought out of Egypt, have quickly forsaken the way that thou hast shewn them, and have made to themselves a molten idol.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi minulle: nouse ja mene nopiasti täältä alas; sillä sinun kansas, jonkas Egyptistä olet johdattanut ulos, on turmellut itsensä, he ovat pikaisesti tieltä menneet pois, jonka minä käskin heille, ja ovat tehneet heillensä valetun kuvan.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto me, Arise, get thee down quickly from hence; for thy people which thou hast brought forth out of Egypt have corrupted themselves; they are quickly turned aside out of the way which I commanded them; they have made them a molten image.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rursumque ait Dominus ad me : Cerno quod populus iste duræ cervicis sit :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֣י לֵאמֹ֑ר רָאִ֙יתִי֙ אֶת־הָעָ֣ם הַזֶּ֔ה וְהִנֵּ֥ה עַם־קְשֵׁה־עֹ֖רֶף הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And again the Lord said to me: I see that this people is stiffnecked:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui minulle, sanoen: minä näin tämän kansan , ja katso, se on niskurikansa.
verses.king_james: Furthermore the Lord spake unto me, saying, I have seen this people, and, behold, it is a stiffnecked people:

verses.latin_vulgate: dimitte me ut conteram eum, et deleam nomen ejus de sub cælo, et constituam te super gentem, quæ hac major et fortior sit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֶ֤רֶף מִמֶּ֙נִּי֙ וְאַשְׁמִידֵ֔ם וְאֶמְחֶ֣ה אֶת־שְׁמָ֔ם מִתַּ֖חַת הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם וְאֶֽעֱשֶׂה֙ אֽוֹתְךָ֔ לְגוֹי־עָצ֥וּם וָרָ֖ב מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let me alone that I may destroy them, and abolish their name from under heaven, and set thee over a nation, that is greater and stronger than this.
verses.finnish_biblia: Salli, että minä hukutan heidät, ja pyyhin heidän nimensä taivaan alta: ja minä tahdon sinun tehdä väkevämmäksi ja suuremmaksi kansaksi kuin tämä on.
verses.king_james: Let me alone, that I may destroy them, and blot out their name from under heaven: and I will make of thee a nation mightier and greater than they.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque de monte ardente descenderem, et duas tabulas fœderis utraque tenerem manu,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֵ֗פֶן וָֽאֵרֵד֙ מִן־הָהָ֔ר וְהָהָ֖ר בֹּעֵ֣ר בָּאֵ֑שׁ וּשְׁנֵי֙ לוּחֹ֣ת הַבְּרִ֔ית עַ֖ל שְׁתֵּ֥י יָדָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when I came down from the burning mount, and held the two tables of the covenant with both hands,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin minä käännyin ja astuin vuorelta alas, joka tulesta paloi, ja pidin kaksi liiton taulua molemmissa käsissäni;
verses.king_james: So I turned and came down from the mount, and the mount burned with fire: and the two tables of the covenant were in my two hands.

verses.latin_vulgate: vidissemque vos peccasse Domino Deo vestro, et fecisse vobis vitulum conflatilem, ac deseruisse velociter viam ejus, quam vobis ostenderat :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֵ֗רֶא וְהִנֵּ֤ה חֲטָאתֶם֙ לַיהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹֽהֵיכֶ֔ם עֲשִׂיתֶ֣ם לָכֶ֔ם עֵ֖גֶל מַסֵּכָ֑ה סַרְתֶּ֣ם מַהֵ֔ר מִן־הַדֶּ֕רֶךְ אֲשֶׁר־צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶתְכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And saw that you had sinned against the Lord your God, and had made to yourselves a molten calf, and had quickly forsaken his way, which he had shewn you:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin näin minä, ja katso, te olitte tehneet syntiä Herraa teidän Jumalaanne vastaan: te olitte tehneet teille valetun vasikan, ja nopiasti menitte pois siltä tieltä, jonka Herra käski teille.
verses.king_james: And I looked, and, behold, ye had sinned against the Lord your God, and had made you a molten calf: ye had turned aside quickly out of the way which the Lord had commanded you.

verses.latin_vulgate: projeci tabulas de manibus meis, confregique eas in conspectu vestro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶתְפֹּשׂ֙ בִּשְׁנֵ֣י הַלֻּחֹ֔ת וָֽאַשְׁלִכֵ֔ם מֵעַ֖ל שְׁתֵּ֣י יָדָ֑י וָאֲשַׁבְּרֵ֖ם לְעֵינֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: I cast the tables out of my hands, and broke them in your sight.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin otin minä ne molemmat taulut ja heitin molemmista käsistäni, ja löin ne rikki teidän silmäinne edessä,
verses.king_james: And I took the two tables, and cast them out of my two hands, and brake them before your eyes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et procidi ante Dominum sicut prius, quadraginta diebus et noctibus panem non comedens, et aquam non bibens, propter omnia peccata vestra quæ gessistis contra Dominum, et eum ad iracundiam provocastis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָֽאֶתְנַפַּל֩ לִפְנֵ֨י יְהֹוָ֜ה כָּרִאשֹׁנָ֗ה אַרְבָּעִ֥ים יוֹם֙ וְאַרְבָּעִ֣ים לַ֔יְלָה לֶ֚חֶם לֹ֣א אָכַ֔לְתִּי וּמַ֖יִם לֹ֣א שָׁתִ֑יתִי עַ֤ל כׇּל־חַטַּאתְכֶם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר חֲטָאתֶ֔ם לַעֲשׂ֥וֹת הָרַ֛ע בְּעֵינֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה לְהַכְעִיסֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I fell down before the Lord as before, forty days and nights neither eating bread, nor drinking water, for all your sins, which you had committed against the Lord, and had provoked him to wrath:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja lankesin maahan Herran eteen, Niinkuin ennenkin, niinä neljänäkymmenenä päivänä ja neljänäkymmenenä yönä, ja en syönyt leipää, enkä juonut vettä, kaikkein teidän synteinne tähden, jotka te tehneet olitte, että te teitte pahaa Herran edessä ja vihoititte hänen.
verses.king_james: And I fell down before the Lord, as at the first, forty days and forty nights: I did neither eat bread, nor drink water, because of all your sins which ye sinned, in doing wickedly in the sight of the Lord, to provoke him to anger.

verses.latin_vulgate: timui enim indignationem et iram illius, qua adversum vos concitatus, delere vos voluit. Et exaudivit me Dominus etiam hac vice.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י יָגֹ֗רְתִּי מִפְּנֵ֤י הָאַף֙ וְהַ֣חֵמָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר קָצַ֧ף יְהֹוָ֛ה עֲלֵיכֶ֖ם לְהַשְׁמִ֣יד אֶתְכֶ֑ם וַיִּשְׁמַ֤ע יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלַ֔י גַּ֖ם בַּפַּ֥עַם הַהִֽוא׃
verses.douay_rheims: For I feared his indignation and anger, wherewith being moved against you, he would have destroyed you. And the Lord heard me this time also.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä pelkäsin sitä vihaa ja hirmuisuutta, jolla Herra teidän päällenne vihastunut oli, niin että hän tahtoi hukuttaa teidät: ja Herra kuuli minun rukoukseni vielä silläkin erällä.
verses.king_james: For I was afraid of the anger and hot displeasure, wherewith the Lord was wroth against you to destroy you. But the Lord hearkened unto me at that time also.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adversum Aaron quoque vehementer iratus, voluit eum conterere, et pro illo similiter deprecatus sum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּֽבְאַהֲרֹ֗ן הִתְאַנַּ֧ף יְהֹוָ֛ה מְאֹ֖ד לְהַשְׁמִיד֑וֹ וָֽאֶתְפַּלֵּ֛ל גַּם־בְּעַ֥ד אַהֲרֹ֖ן בָּעֵ֥ת הַהִֽוא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he was exceeding angry against Aaron also, and would have destroyed him, and I prayed in like manner for him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra oli myös suuresti vihainen Aaronin päälle, niin että hän tahtoi hänen hukuttaa; vaan minä rukoilin silloin Aaroninkin edestä.
verses.king_james: And the Lord was very angry with Aaron to have destroyed him: and I prayed for Aaron also the same time.

verses.latin_vulgate: Peccatum autem vestrum quod feceratis, id est, vitulum, arripiens, igne combussi, et in frusta comminuens, omninoque in pulverem redigens, projeci in torrentem, qui de monte descendit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאֶת־חַטַּאתְכֶ֞ם אֲשֶׁר־עֲשִׂיתֶ֣ם אֶת־הָעֵ֗גֶל לָקַ֘חְתִּי֮ וָאֶשְׂרֹ֣ף אֹת֣וֹ ׀ בָּאֵשׁ֒ וָאֶכֹּ֨ת אֹת֤וֹ טָחוֹן֙ הֵיטֵ֔ב עַ֥ד אֲשֶׁר־דַּ֖ק לְעָפָ֑ר וָֽאַשְׁלִךְ֙ אֶת־עֲפָר֔וֹ אֶל־הַנַּ֖חַל הַיֹּרֵ֥ד מִן־הָהָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And your sin that you had committed, that is, the calf, I took, and burned it with fire, and breaking it into pieces, until it was as small as dust, I threw it into the torrent, which cometh down from the mountain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta teidän syntinne, vasikan, jonka te tehneet olitte, otin minä ja poltin tulessa, ja löin sen rikki ja survoin hyvästi, siihenasti että se mureni tomuksi, ja heitin tomun ojaan, joka siitä vuoresta vuosi.
verses.king_james: And I took your sin, the calf which ye had made, and burnt it with fire, and stamped it, and ground it very small, even until it was as small as dust: and I cast the dust thereof into the brook that descended out of the mount.

verses.latin_vulgate: In incendio quoque, et in tentatione, et in Sepulchris concupiscentiæ provocastis Dominum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְתַבְעֵרָה֙ וּבְמַסָּ֔ה וּבְקִבְרֹ֖ת הַֽתַּאֲוָ֑ה מַקְצִפִ֥ים הֱיִיתֶ֖ם אֶת־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: At the burning also, and at the place of temptation, and at the graves of lust you provoked the Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös Tabeerassa, ja Massassa, ja Himohaudoillas te vihoititte Herran.
verses.king_james: And at Taberah, and at Massah, and at Kibroth–hattaavah, ye provoked the Lord to wrath.

verses.latin_vulgate: et quando misit vos de Cadesbarne, dicens : Ascendite, et possidete terram, quam dedi vobis, et contempsistis imperium Domini Dei vestri, et non credidistis ei, neque vocem ejus audire voluistis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבִשְׁלֹ֨חַ יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶתְכֶ֗ם מִקָּדֵ֤שׁ בַּרְנֵ֙עַ֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר עֲלוּ֙ וּרְשׁ֣וּ אֶת־הָאָ֔רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָתַ֖תִּי לָכֶ֑ם וַתַּמְר֗וּ אֶת־פִּ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹ֣הֵיכֶ֔ם וְלֹ֤א הֶֽאֱמַנְתֶּם֙ ל֔וֹ וְלֹ֥א שְׁמַעְתֶּ֖ם בְּקֹלֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he sent you from Cadesbarne, saying: Go up, and possess the land that I have given you, and you slighted the commandment of the Lord your God, and did not believe him, neither would you hearken to his voice:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Herra lähetti teidät KadesBarneasta, ja sanoi: menkäät ja omistakaat maa, jonka minä annoin teille, niin te olitte Herran teidän Jumalanne suulle vastahakoiset, ja ette uskoneet häntä, ette myös olleet kuuliaiset hänen äänellensä.
verses.king_james: Likewise when the Lord sent you from Kadesh–barnea, saying, Go up and possess the land which I have given you; then ye rebelled against the commandment of the Lord your God, and ye believed him not, nor hearkened to his voice.

verses.latin_vulgate: sed semper fuistis rebelles a die qua nosse vos cœpi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַמְרִ֥ים הֱיִיתֶ֖ם עִם־יְהֹוָ֑ה מִיּ֖וֹם דַּעְתִּ֥י אֶתְכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But were always rebellious from the day that I began to know you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Te olette olleet Herralle tottelemattomat, siitä päivästä kuin minä teidän tuntenut olen.
verses.king_james: Ye have been rebellious against the Lord from the day that I knew you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et jacui coram Domino quadraginta diebus ac noctibus, quibus eum suppliciter deprecabar, ne deleret vos ut fuerat comminatus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָֽאֶתְנַפַּ֞ל לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֗ה אֵ֣ת אַרְבָּעִ֥ים הַיּ֛וֹם וְאֶת־אַרְבָּעִ֥ים הַלַּ֖יְלָה אֲשֶׁ֣ר הִתְנַפָּ֑לְתִּי כִּֽי־אָמַ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה לְהַשְׁמִ֥יד אֶתְכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I lay prostrate before the Lord forty days and nights, in which I humbly besought him, that he would not destroy you as he had threatened:
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä lankesin maahan Herran eteen, neljäkymmentä päivää ja neljäkymmentä yötä, kuin minä siinä makasin; sillä Herra sanoi, että hän tahtoi hukuttaa teidät.
verses.king_james: Thus I fell down before the Lord forty days and forty nights, as I fell down at the first; because the Lord had said he would destroy you.

verses.latin_vulgate: et orans dixi : Domine Deus, ne disperdas populum tuum, et hæreditatem tuam, quam redemisti in magnitudine tua, quos eduxisti de Ægypto in manu forti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶתְפַּלֵּ֣ל אֶל־יְהֹוָה֮ וָאֹמַר֒ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֗ה אַל־תַּשְׁחֵ֤ת עַמְּךָ֙ וְנַחֲלָ֣תְךָ֔ אֲשֶׁ֥ר פָּדִ֖יתָ בְּגׇדְלֶ֑ךָ אֲשֶׁר־הוֹצֵ֥אתָ מִמִּצְרַ֖יִם בְּיָ֥ד חֲזָקָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And praying, I said: O Lord God, destroy not thy people, and thy inheritance, which thou hast redeemed in thy greatness, whom thou hast brought out of Egypt with a strong hand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä rukoilin Herraa, sanoen: Herra, Herra, älä hukuta kansaas ja perikuntaas, jonka suurella voimallas pelastanut ja väkevällä kädelläs Egyptistä olet johdattanut ulos,
verses.king_james: I prayed therefore unto the Lord, and said, O Lord God, destroy not thy people and thine inheritance, which thou hast redeemed through thy greatness, which thou hast brought forth out of Egypt with a mighty hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Recordare servorum tuorum Abraham, Isaac, et Jacob : ne aspicias duritiam populi hujus, et impietatem atque peccatum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זְכֹר֙ לַעֲבָדֶ֔יךָ לְאַבְרָהָ֥ם לְיִצְחָ֖ק וּֽלְיַעֲקֹ֑ב אַל־תֵּ֗פֶן אֶל־קְשִׁי֙ הָעָ֣ם הַזֶּ֔ה וְאֶל־רִשְׁע֖וֹ וְאֶל־חַטָּאתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Remember thy servants Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob: look not on the stubbornness of this people, nor on their wickedness and sin:
verses.finnish_biblia: Muista palvelioitas Abrahamia, Isaakia ja Jakobia: älä katso tämän kansan kovuutta, jumalattomuutta ja syntiä,
verses.king_james: Remember thy servants, Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob; look not unto the stubbornness of this people, nor to their wickedness, nor to their sin:

verses.latin_vulgate: ne forte dicant habitatores terræ, de qua eduxisti nos : Non poterat Dominus introducere eos in terram, quam pollicitus est eis, et oderat illos : idcirco eduxit, ut interficeret eos in solitudine :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פֶּן־יֹאמְר֗וּ הָאָ֘רֶץ֮ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הוֹצֵאתָ֣נוּ מִשָּׁם֒ מִבְּלִי֙ יְכֹ֣לֶת יְהֹוָ֔ה לַהֲבִיאָ֕ם אֶל־הָאָ֖רֶץ אֲשֶׁר־דִּבֶּ֣ר לָהֶ֑ם וּמִשִּׂנְאָת֣וֹ אוֹתָ֔ם הוֹצִיאָ֖ם לַהֲמִתָ֥ם בַּמִּדְבָּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Lest perhaps the inhabitants of the land, out of which thou hast brought us, say: The Lord could not bring them into the land that he promised them, and he hated them: therefore he brought them out, that he might kill them in the wilderness,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ettei sen maan asuvaiset, jostas meidät johdattanut olet, sanoisi: sentähden, ettei Herra voinut heitä viedä siihen maahan, jonka hän heille luvannut oli, ja että hän on vihannut heitä, johdatti hän heidät ulos, tappaaksensa heitä korvessa.
verses.king_james: Lest the land whence thou broughtest us out say, Because the Lord was not able to bring them into the land which he promised them, and because he hated them, he hath brought them out to slay them in the wilderness.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui sunt populus tuus et hæreditas tua, quos eduxisti in fortitudine tua magna, et in brachio tuo extento.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֵ֥ם עַמְּךָ֖ וְנַחֲלָתֶ֑ךָ אֲשֶׁ֤ר הוֹצֵ֙אתָ֙ בְּכֹחֲךָ֣ הַגָּדֹ֔ל וּבִֽזְרֹעֲךָ֖ הַנְּטוּיָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Who are thy people and thy inheritance, whom thou hast brought out by thy great strength, and in thy stretched out arm.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä he ovat sinun kansas ja perimykses, jonka suurella voimallas ja ojennetulla käsivarrellas johdattanut olet.
verses.king_james: Yet they are thy people and thine inheritance, which thou broughtest out by thy mighty power and by thy stretched out arm.
